name: Asteroid Engine Demo — Modernize & One-Command Build
summary: Modernize a 2010 C++/OpenGL/OpenAL 2D game engine + asteroid demo so it builds and runs on a current machine with a single command and zero manual dependency installs.

source.description: A platform-independent 2D game engine (OpenGL + GLUT + OpenAL/alut) and an asteroid demo built on it. The engine repo is the standalone library plus a reference desktop demo; the demo repo adds the packaged desktop + iPhone versions. Both are provided as the model may need to modify engine code.
